cold_open: curious and intimate, a soft question floating up, who sent that thought, gently mysterious
setup: gently curious, the quiet feeling of noticing your own mind, light and inquisitive
the_white_bear: playful and a little uncanny, a teasing game with your own head, light pizzicato
the_turn: something quietly dawning, a hopeful lift as the mystery opens up
reveal_1: warm discovery, the mind wandering on its own, strings opening with quiet wonder
reveal_2: unsettling and intriguing, a quiet shiver of doubt, the brain acting first, suspended and curious
the_history_turn: playful curiosity turning back in time, bright and inquisitive
history_the_twist: light and amused, a funny old misunderstanding, warm and whimsical
human_layer: reassuring and grounding, warm and intimate, a steadying calm
payoff: hopeful and gently liberating, a soft uplift, you are not your thoughts
button: warm and resolved, a soft closing wonder, settling with a gentle smile
